com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXVariantWire

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractConductor, IXActiveObject, IXConnectivityObject, IXHighwayConductor, IXLibrariedObject, IXModuledObject, IXObject, IXWire, IXWriteableObject
    Deprecated. 
    use IXConductorVariant instead

    public interface IXVariantWire
extends IXWire
    Interface providing access to the center-strip splices, signal, harness, harness levels and variant signal of this variant wire connected to a refined connector.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getVariantOptionExpression()
      Deprecated. 
      Get the variant option expression for this variant wire.
      IXVariantSignal getVariantSignal()
      Deprecated. 
      Get the vriant signal implemented by this variant wire.
      IXWire getWire()
      Deprecated. 
      Get the real non variant wire.

    • Method Detail

      • getWire

        IXWire getWire()
        Deprecated. 
        Get the real non variant wire.
        Returns:
        the real non variant wire, never null.

      • getVariantOptionExpression

        java.lang.String getVariantOptionExpression()
        Deprecated. 
        Get the variant option expression for this variant wire.
        Returns:
        the variant option expression of this wire.

      • getVariantSignal

        IXVariantSignal getVariantSignal()
        Deprecated. 
        Get the vriant signal implemented by this variant wire.
        Returns:
        the variant signal implemented by this wire, never null
